title: T3b Apply T2 changes to main + interactive verify
description:
Migrate T2 edits from the abandoned worktree to the main dotfiles checkout (~/.dotfiles/nvim/.config/nvim/) and run the interactive checklist. Account for existing uncommitted modifications in options.lua and which-key.lua — use context-based edits, not worktree line numbers.

## Required Skills
worker
acceptance_criteria: All 5 file edits present and intact in ~/.dotfiles/nvim/.config/nvim/. Interactive checklist a-i from plan T3 returns pass for at least a, b, c, d, g, h, i. Any failures recorded as follow-up beads before T4.
notes: Pivot reason: worktree headless/lazy-lock fragility. Files to migrate: lib/tablist.lua (new, copy verbatim), snacks.lua (add tabs source to picker.sources), options.lua (add vim.opt.showtabline = 0), keymaps.lua (add <leader>ut toggle), which-key.lua (add <leader>u group). Source location: ~/.dotfiles.nvim-tabs-sidebar/nvim/.config/nvim/. Target: ~/.dotfiles/nvim/.config/nvim/.

title: T2 Implement Snacks.picker tabs source + wiring
description:
Add lua/lib/tablist.lua (the snacks picker source spec + open/toggle helpers + refresh autocmds), extend snacks opts.picker.sources.tabs, add <leader>ut keymap, set showtabline=0.

## Required Skills
worker
acceptance_criteria: Files created/edited per plan T2 Target files block. 'nvim --headless +"lua require(\'lib.tablist\')" +qa' exits 0. 'nvim --headless +"lua Snacks.picker.tabs()" +"sleep 100m" +qa' exits 0. Interactive: <leader>ut shows left sidebar @ 40 cols listing tabpages, <CR> switches and stays open, d closes tab and refreshes, a adds tab, <leader>ut toggles, showtabline=0.
notes: Plan: ~/Sync/Obsidian/Second Brain/Plans/Plan - Nvim Tabpages Sidebar via Snacks Picker.md (Task 2 section). Canonical template: ~/.local/share/nvim/lazy/snacks.nvim/docs/picker.md:1010-1036 (explorer source spec). Worktree root: ~/.dotfiles.nvim-tabs-sidebar/
close_reason: Implemented. Files created: lib/tablist.lua (149 lines). Files edited: snacks.lua (line 53: tabs = require('lib.tablist').source inside picker.sources), options.lua (line 72: vim.opt.showtabline = 0), keymaps.lua (lines 109-111: <leader>ut toggle), which-key.lua (line 69: <leader>u → [U]I group). Mirrors lib/worktree.lua style (single quotes, LuaDoc ---@). Open concerns for T3 verification: (a) picker:norm(function() end) in confirm action is a redundant passthrough (works, but unnecessary for tabnext); (b) Snacks.picker.tabs() callable form depends on snacks auto-registering custom sources as methods — fallback is Snacks.picker.pick({source='tabs'}); (c) headless nvim was blocked under worker hook profile, deferred to T3 via build-runner.

title: T1 Preflight: verify snacks spec + config baseline
description:
Answer 8 preflight questions so T2 can implement without rediscovery.

## Required Skills
search
acceptance_criteria: Short report answering every question in the plan's T1 Input section with file:line citations or explicit 'not present'. Covers: snacks lazy spec location and current opts, snacks.explorer layout/auto_close, existing custom Snacks.picker sources, showtabline/tabline= values, all <leader>u… mappings, existing Tab* autocmds, lua/lib/ existence + worktree.lua style, Neovim version (>=0.10 needed for getcwd(-1,tabnr)).
notes: Plan: ~/Sync/Obsidian/Second Brain/Plans/Plan - Nvim Tabpages Sidebar via Snacks Picker.md (Task 1 section). Worktree root: ~/.dotfiles.nvim-tabs-sidebar/
close_reason: Preflight complete. Key findings: (1) Snacks host is nvim/.config/nvim/lua/kickstart/plugins/snacks.lua (NOT explorer.lua); uses direct require('snacks').setup{} call not lazy opts pattern. Current picker.sources has only lsp_definitions (lines 49-53). (2) snacks.explorer is NOT enabled — user runs yazi.nvim instead. Left edge uncontested; plan's mutual-exclusion risk no longer applies. (3) No custom picker sources, no name collision risk for 'tabs'. (4) showtabline/tabline not set — defaults apply; T2 will set =0 per plan. (5) <leader>ut/uT/tt all free. <leader>ur (only u-mapping in use) at lua/keymaps.lua:107. (6) No Tab* autocmds exist. (7) lib/worktree.lua style confirmed: header comment, pcall dep check, local M={}, LuaDoc annotations. Mirror this in lib/tablist.lua. (8) Neovim version not enforced in config and nvim --version blocked by hook; T2 will include defensive fallback for getcwd(-1,tabnr). IMPORTANT PATH PREFIX: stow layout means files live at nvim/.config/nvim/lua/... NOT .config/nvim/lua/...

title: Nvim tabpages sidebar via Snacks.picker custom source
description: Replace Neovim's default horizontal tabline with a left-edge sidebar driven by a custom Snacks.picker source named 'tabs'. Mirrors the snacks.explorer pattern (auto_close=false, jump={close=false}, layout={preset='sidebar', preview=false}). Mutually exclusive with snacks.explorer on the left edge by design. Zero new plugin dependencies.
notes: Plan note: ~/Sync/Obsidian/Second Brain/Plans/Plan - Nvim Tabpages Sidebar via Snacks Picker.md (supersedes Plan - Nvim Tabpages Sidebar via Edgy.md). Worktree: ~/.dotfiles.nvim-tabs-sidebar/
